explorer.spa.Router.desc: Panel router class. Manages a view stack and optional location.hash sync.
morphology: registerView<D>(viewClass: { prefix: string; parse(rest: string, deps: D): any; }, deps: D): void {} // :29-34

explorer.spa.Router.registerView.desc: Registers a view class and its deps as a factory for hash restoration. The factory is only used when restoring a view from a URL fragment — normal navigation calls push() directly.

explorer.spa.Router.init.desc: Optionally starts location.hash sync and restores any view encoded in the current hash.

explorer.spa.Router.push.desc: Pushes a view instance onto the stack, notifies subscribers, and writes the route to the URL hash. Skips identical-route pushes.

explorer.spa.Router.back.desc: Pops the top view off the stack, notifies subscribers, and rewrites the URL hash.

explorer.spa.Router.close.desc: Empties the stack, notifies subscribers, and clears the URL hash.

explorer.spa.Router.refresh.desc: Re-notifies subscribers without changing the stack. Used after the store loads new chunks so a hash-restored view repaints with real data.

explorer.spa.panelRouter.desc: Default Router instance shared across the SPA.
